历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 4078→4041→4522→6288→5898. In 2024, due to the subdivision of major groups under the new Gaokao, the ranking shifted back to 6288, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 5898, with a baseline of about 5900–6300 in recent two years. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi Province was 108 in 2021, 104 in 2022, 107 in 2023, 94 in 2024, and 91 in 2025, showing a continuous slight reduction. In 2026, the plan is 100, an increase of about 9.9% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985/211/Double First-Class university, ranked 16th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (Top20), with a stable ranking between 11–16 in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving 51 incidents (46 negative) related to teacher ethics and academic misconduct, which has a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including Stomatology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Software Engineering A, etc., with balanced strengths in medicine, humanities, and science and engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular Gaokao candidates in Jiangxi Province is about 474,900, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 472,500 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu (Southwest China), which is an out-of-province choice for Jiangxi candidates. Its enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is about 3.3% (2025), which is moderately low, and regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 5898, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 9.9% (which pushes the ranking number higher), and the negative reputation (which suppresses application enthusiasm), these factors roughly offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 6248, with a range of 5748–6748.

Those with rankings around the middle (about 6248) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, and Cyberspace Security. Candidates near the upper bound (6748) are advised to consider Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also paying attention to opportunities brought by enrollment expansion.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 四川大学在江西省医学类2021年最低位次4078（计划18人），2022年21343（计划19人，护理学拉低），2023年17868（计划19人，护理学继续拉低），2024年4907（计划12人， 新高考改革后护理学移出医学类），2025年5684（计划15人，新增药学类）。2026年医学类总计划增至19人（扩招4人，+26.7%），且护理学重新纳入医学类招生（5人），将显著 拉低最低位次。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校（A类）。学校综合实力雄厚，医学学科（华西医学中心）在全国享有极高 声誉，临床医学、口腔医学等专业长期位居全国前列，对江西考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续攀升，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业位次连年走高（2025年临床医学八年医位次674、口腔5+3位次1032）。但护理学因入校后不能转专业，报 考热度相对较低，其回归将拉低医学类整体最低位次。四川大学地处成都，地域吸引力较强，但距离江西较远，对部分考生有一定影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及趋势修正，预测2026年四川大学在江西省医学类最低录取位次为6893名，波动区间为6548~7238名。护理学回归是位次后移（数字增大）的主要驱动因 素，同时扩招4人进一步放大位次后移效应，但医学整体热度上升起到部分抵消作用。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Sichuan University's medical category in Jiangxi Province: 2021 minimum rank 4078 (plan 18), 2022 rank 21343 (plan 19, lowered by nursing), 2023 rank 17868 (plan 19, nursing continues to lower), 2024 rank 4907 (plan 12, nursing moved out of medical category after new college entrance exam reform), 2025 rank 5684 (plan 15, new pharmacy category added). In 2026, the total plan for medical category increases to 19 (expansion of 4, +26.7%), and nursing is re-included in the medical category enrollment (5 people), which will significantly lower the minimum rank.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a national Double First-Class construction university (Class A). The university has strong comprehensive strength, and its medical disciplines (West China Medical Center) enjoy a very high reputation nationwide. Clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors have long been among the top in the country, strongly attracting Jiangxi candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise. Core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology have seen increasing rankings year by year (2025 clinical medicine eight-year program rank 674, stomatology 5+3 rank 1032). However, nursing, due to the inability to transfer majors after enrollment, has relatively low popularity, and its return will lower the overall minimum rank of the medical category. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, which has strong regional appeal, but being far from Jiangxi has some impact on some candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and trend correction, it is predicted that the minimum admission rank for Sichuan University's medical category in Jiangxi Province in 2026 will be 6893, with a fluctuation range of 6548 to 7238. The return of nursing is the main driving factor for the rank moving backward (number increasing), and the expansion of 4 people further amplifies the rank backward effect, but the overall rise in medical popularity partially offsets this.

- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Stomatology
